item.title: [FFXIV Waymark Presets]Another Aloalo Island
item.description:
AI-translated English article
This companion article follows the same Waymark Preset template in English.
What This Article Covers
  • A Waymark Preset article for XIVLauncher users
  • How to copy and import the preset
  • A screenshot and code block for each content section
Repository Waymark Preset PluginThe Waymark Preset Plugin repository. Check this first if you need setup details.→

How to Use This Article

This template assumes that XIVLauncher and Waymark Preset Plugin are already installed.

item.title: Image Converter: An Image Conversion App Developed with AI Assistance
item.description: An introduction to Image Converter, an image conversion app developed with AI assistance that converts PNG, JPEG, and WebP directly in the browser.

item.title: "Black Path Game": a Browser Game Developed with AI Assistance
item.description: An English companion article introducing Black Path Game, a browser-based path-building game with missing cells, traps, and time limits, developed with AI assistance.

item.title: "Dodgem Browser": a Browser Game Developed with AI Assistance
item.description: An English companion article introducing Dodgem Browser, a browser-based Dodgem game with local play, CPU opponents, and online multiplayer, developed with AI assistance.

item.title: "LoL Cooldown Overlay": a League of Legends Spell Cooldown Overlay Developed with AI Assistance
item.description: An English companion article introducing LoL Cooldown Overlay, a manual enemy spell cooldown overlay for League of Legends developed with AI assistance.

item.title: "Budget Book": a Household Budget App Developed with AI Assistance
item.description: An English companion article introducing Budget Book as a household budget app developed with AI assistance, focused on recording, summarizing, budgeting, and subscription tracking.

item.title: "LAN Library": a Local Library and Manga Viewer I Developed with AI Assistance
item.description: An English companion article introducing LAN Library as a project developed with AI assistance: a local-only library and manga viewer designed for use within a home network.

item.title: Heavyweight Savage Floor 4 Splatoon Layout
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original memo for the Arcadion Savage Heavyweight Floor 4 Splatoon layout.

item.title: Heavyweight Savage Floor 3 Splatoon Layout
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original memo for the Arcadion Savage Heavyweight Floor 3 Splatoon layout.

item.title: Heavyweight Savage Floor 2 Splatoon Layout
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original memo for the Arcadion Savage Heavyweight Floor 2 Splatoon layout.

item.title: Heavyweight Savage Floor 1 Splatoon Layout
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original memo for the Arcadion Savage Heavyweight Floor 1 Splatoon layout.

item.title: Is the Real World Really Analog?
item.description: A short essay on whether the physical world can really be called analog, using the contrast between continuity and discreteness as a guide.

item.title: Patch 7.4 Extreme Splatoon Layout
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original memo for the Patch 7.4 Extreme Splatoon layout.

item.title: Regular Star Polygons
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original article on the names, properties, and construction of regular star polygons.

item.title: Automatic Differentiation
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original article on automatic differentiation with dual numbers and validated computation.

item.title: Numerical Differentiation
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original article on finite-difference differentiation, step size, and floating-point error.

item.title: Numerical Integration
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original article on numerical integration, including the trapezoidal rule, DE formula, and interval-based validation.

item.title: Interval Arithmetic
item.description: An AI-translated English edition of the original article introducing interval arithmetic and how it preserves guaranteed bounds even in the presence of rounding error.

item.title: Floating-Point Numbers
item.description: An English AI translation of the original article on why floating-point numbers cannot represent every real number exactly and how that creates numerical error.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi there.
This is a personal blog by someone who really loves online games.

🔧 Interests

  • Online games / MMORPGs
  • Custom PCs
  • Devices that make daily life more comfortable
  • Programming

🎯 Goal

To enjoy life at my own pace.

Feel free to look around.
